programmes.show_description: Benson tries to help a student after she's assaulted on a field trip. Fin suspects a witness in the case may not be telling the whole truth.
After an EMT is shot and killed, Danny and Baez try to find who is behind a chain of ambulance robberies. Frank defends New York's homeless after the mayor enacts a new law.
A widow blames Frank for her husband's recent suicide, while Eddie has a gut feeling about a murder. A desperate Luis Delgado wants protection for his sons.
Deputies work together to stay on the tail of a fleeing vehicle. An argumentative driver keeps his friends tuned in as he livestreams his own arrest.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Ideal World Shopping - For All Your Shopping Needs
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
While investigating the crash of a military plane that was transporting caskets, the NCIS team discovers a discrepancy with the DNA remains.
The search into the disappearance of a marine lieutenant continues, with the trail leading to Afghanistan.
Tony's father claims to have no memory of the night when he is found inside a car containing a dead body in the boot.
Crime drama. After a student jumps to his death from a dormitory window, it emerges that the boy was suffering side effects from an experimental antidepressant.
Crime drama. Two undercover officers are killed during a firearms sting and it emerges that their pictures had been posted on a website, alerting criminals to their identity.
Crime drama. A famous novelist dies from complications following plastic surgery. Evidence emerges that her surgeon made a crucial mistake and then ignored her pleas for help.
A promiscuous young lawyer is found bludgeoned to death in her office, and Fontana and Green suspect one of her colleagues.
An investigation into the murders of an infamous porn actress and a maverick publisher lead to the top of the police department.
The shooting of a Panamanian jockey puts Detectives Fontana and Falco on the trail of some colourful suspects from the world of racing.
The team's search for a terrorist targeting the Navy takes an unsettling turn when a high-tech bug is found in a probationary agent's tooth.
Harper Dearing's quest for revenge on those he considers responsible for his son's death shakes NCIS to its core.
US crime drama. After Harper Dearing's bombing of the NCIS headquarters, Gibbs goes on the hunt to find the criminal mastermind.
Shaw and Riley discover a shocking motive after a young man is pushed in front of a train. In court, Price must persuade Baxter to testify about the misuse of legislation he wrote.
A runaway bride calls the SVU for help on the day of her wedding. Rollins pitches in on her day off.
Agent Sykes struggles to cope on the anniversary of her sister's disappearance. Benson suspects a cold case from Manhattan could help her get closure.
The SVU searches for a pattern assailant before his crimes escalate to murder. Fin must contend with a suspect's aggrieved son.
Benson and Carisi are baffled when a series of assaults have the same M.O. but different DNA at each scene. Muncy believes Elias Olsen has struck again and is determined to prove it.
In the last episode of the series, Benson and Stabler combine forces on a case that has now spread globally as they search for a revenge-for-hire crime ring.
Dr Reid suffers a brain injury, the BAU make a shocking discovery about Lynch that affects Rossi personally, and the team gathers to celebrate Rossi's retirement.
Deputies are concerned when a fleeing man leaves a trail of illicit items. A young woman unwisely decides to hang out with a man she nicknamed "Sketchy."
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Ideal World Shopping - For All Your Shopping Needs
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
After a Navy captain is murdered in his hotel room, the NCIS team has to find his pregnant companion and protect her from unknown assailants.
The NCIS team investigates the murder of a Navy lieutenant commander while dealing with her distraught husband. Ziva considers her future when Ray returns.
An investigation into the murder of a naval attache on holiday from Egypt is complicated by the intervention of her husband, who is also a detective.
The wife of the Governor of Connecticut is murdered, leading police to uncover a gay love triangle involving her husband.
A notorious radio DJ survives an attempt on his life and detectives learn that the case is connected to the Mafia.
Crime drama. When a jeweller is shot dead in the middle of Times Square, detectives suspect he was killed because he betrayed his associates in the Russian mob.
Crime drama. A handgun found at an arson crime scene leads detectives to arrest a man in connection with an old murder.
Flaw: New episode of crime drama. Detective Olivia Benson assists Fontana and Green as they probe the death of a con man who tried to call Benson just before he was murdered (2/22).
Ghosts: Crime drama. A deathbed confession prompts Fontana and Green to re-open a ten-year-old murder case. Fontana's unorthodox methods bring him into conflict with McCoy (3/22).
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
The team investigates the cause of a mysterious death involving an NCIS armoury employee that was discovered four months after the Navy Yard bombings.
While on medical leave, Ducky decides to reopen a 12-year-old case by ordering the exhumation of a Navy commander's body.
The NCIS team investigate a helicopter crash on shore and have to locate the missing pilot. Meanwhile, Ziva issues a dare to Tony and McGee.
The BAU probes a deadly Gold Star conspiracy while serial killer Elias Voit's custody transfer leads to a complication in their backyard.
Drama series. A woman with a high-risk pregnancy is kidnapped as she approaches her delivery date and Benson and Stabler are faced with more than one suspect.
Crime drama series. The team probes the connection between the deaths of two high school students and an illegal marketing campaign by a major pharmaceutical company.
As the squad celebrates the birth of Rollins and Carisi's child, another child goes missing in broad daylight.
